title: The time has come.
content:
George W Bush will address the nation (and obviously the world) tonight at 8PM EST (1AM GMT, 8AM Thai). He's expecting to prepare the American people for war -- in away, making a formal announcement that "he" is going to  **invade{/b] Iraq. It's also highly possible that he will take the opportunity to send a message to the Iraqi president to step down from the post, in order to avoid the war.

I guess the war is really unavoidable now. Actually, there're numbers of casualties even before the war starts. One of them is the UN Security Counsil.  %(me)"The wound is too deep." .. I think someone said that.%

Crazy Bush. Huh~
